basic_details.job_title: NISER Bhubaneswar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER Bhubaneswar)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER Bhubaneswar) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website niser.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NISER Bhubaneswar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree (physics or Electronics) or 3 years of Diploma in Electronics Engineering
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Physics or Electronics. OR 3 years of Diploma in Electronics Engineering.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NISER Bhubaneswar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NISER Bhubaneswar Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Assistant position at NISER Bhubaneswar is 11th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Physics or Electronics, or a 3-year Diploma in Electronics Engineering to be eligible for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Assistant position is 50 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 27,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Assistant job at NISER Bhubaneswar?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant role will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted for the interview based on their applications.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NISER / R&D / CMRP2601 / 03 / 2026-27.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position at NISER Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NISER Bhubaneswar located?
faq.answer: NISER Bhubaneswar is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with the pincode 752050.
